componentDescription: A versatile switch toggle component with customizable styles and states for user interaction.

activeChild.description: The content to be displayed when the switch is in an active state.

id.description: Unique identifier for the switch component.

isDisabled.description: Determines if the switch is disabled.

isReadOnly.description: Determines if the switch is read-only.

isChecked.description: Determines if the switch is checked (on).

onChange.description: Callback function to handle the change event.

name.description: Name attribute for the switch component, useful for form submission.

inActiveChild.description: The content to be displayed when the switch is in an inactive state.

views.description: Custom styles to apply to the switch component.

shadow.description: Defines the shadow appearance of the switch using predefined Shadow or Elevation, or a custom CSSProperties object.

size.description: Specifies the size of the switch component.

labelPosition.description: The position of the label relative to the switch, either 'left' or 'right'.

isHovered.description: Denotes if the switch component is currently hovered by the cursor.

setIsHovered.description: Function to set the hover state of the switch component.

value.description: Controls the value or state of the switch (on/off).

setValue.description: Function to update the value of the switch.

label.description: The label content for the switch.

helperText.description: Helper text to display below the switch component.
